issues.title: Scryfall deck loading returns only 1 copy per unique card
issues.description: parseDeckList("4 Lightning Bolt") sends 4 identical identifiers to /cards/collection, which deduplicates them. A "4 Lightning Bolt" entry yields 1 card, not 4. This fundamentally breaks deck loading.
descriptions: parseDeckList("4 Lightning Bolt") sends 4 identical identifiers to /cards/collection, which deduplicates them. A "4 Lightning Bolt" entry yields 1 card, not 4. This fundamentally breaks deck loading.

issues.title: sendToHand loses card metadata
issues.description: Returning a card from board to hand creates {id, src} but drops meta (name, mana cost, etc.). getHand then shows cards with no identifying info.
descriptions: Returning a card from board to hand creates {id, src} but drops meta (name, mana cost, etc.). getHand then shows cards with no identifying info.

issues.title: sendToDeck has the same metadata loss
issues.description: Same pattern as sendToHand — returning a card from board to deck drops meta (name, mana cost, etc.).
descriptions: Same pattern as sendToHand — returning a card from board to deck drops meta (name, mana cost, etc.).

issues.title: Dynamic Zod schema loses nested object validation
issues.description: addCounter.counter's required label field isn't enforced; any object passes.
descriptions: addCounter.counter's required label field isn't enforced; any object passes.

issues.title: loadSnapshot doesn't clear existing shapes
issues.description: Loading twice duplicates all shapes instead of replacing them.
descriptions: Loading twice duplicates all shapes instead of replacing them.

issues.title: card_faces[].image_uris can be undefined
issues.description: Some Scryfall card layouts don't have per-face image URIs; code will throw when accessing them.
descriptions: Some Scryfall card layouts don't have per-face image URIs; code will throw when accessing them.

issues.title: Agent connection state diverges between Zustand store and local component state
issues.description: If WebSocket disconnects unexpectedly, UI still shows "connected". Should derive from connectedAgentPeerIds.
descriptions: If WebSocket disconnects unexpectedly, UI still shows "connected". Should derive from connectedAgentPeerIds.

issues.title: untapAll triggers N broadcasts
issues.description: Each shape update sends a full snapshot over WebSocket. Should batch all untap operations into a single broadcast.
descriptions: Each shape update sends a full snapshot over WebSocket. Should batch all untap operations into a single broadcast.

issues.title: Sort-based shuffle is biased
issues.description: For a 60-card deck, the sort(() => Math.random()) pattern doesn't produce uniform permutations. Use Fisher-Yates.
descriptions: For a 60-card deck, the sort(() => Math.random()) pattern doesn't produce uniform permutations. Use Fisher-Yates.

issues.title: Race condition in disconnectAgent double cleanup
issues.description: disconnectAgent may perform double cleanup if called concurrently.
descriptions: disconnectAgent may perform double cleanup if called concurrently.

issues.title: Agent port input accepts non-numeric text, no validation feedback
issues.description: No input validation or user feedback when non-numeric text is entered for agent port.
descriptions: No input validation or user feedback when non-numeric text is entered for agent port.

issues.title: actionLog grows unboundedly
issues.description: actionLog array grows without limit, causing a memory leak for long sessions.
descriptions: actionLog array grows without limit, causing a memory leak for long sessions.

issues.title: --visibility CLI arg isn't validated
issues.description: The --visibility command-line argument is not validated against allowed values.
descriptions: The --visibility command-line argument is not validated against allowed values.

issues.title: Duplicated generateId/shuffle across state.ts and scryfall.ts
issues.description: generateId and shuffle utility functions are duplicated in state.ts and scryfall.ts. Should be extracted to a shared utility.
descriptions: generateId and shuffle utility functions are duplicated in state.ts and scryfall.ts. Should be extracted to a shared utility.

issues.title: String.prototype.substr is deprecated
issues.description: Uses deprecated substr() method — should use .slice() or .substring() instead.
descriptions: Uses deprecated substr() method — should use .slice() or .substring() instead.
